message:
feat(test): expand search daemon worker/server inline tests to 30+

worker.rs: 4 → 32 tests. Added coverage for worker ID storage,
processed counter behavior (increment on success, skip on error),
build_embedder variants (None, empty, hash, fnv1a-hash, explicit
dimensions, errors), response fields, determinism, empty/long/unicode
text, Debug impl, multiple worker independence.

server.rs: 5 → 30 tests. Added coverage for port storage, set_running
lifecycle, processed counter (embed/ping/shutdown), shutdown-then-embed
failure, restart after shutdown, model validation errors, sequential
request handling, determinism, empty/unicode text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
